label: Dev.to & Habr — Tech Blogging
description: Dev.to (English) and Habr (Russian) — tech blogging platforms. Clean article layout with community features. Reading feed, articles with code blocks, comments, claps/reactions, publishing. Dev.to: OAuth via GitHub/Twitter. Habr: email/social login. Both have a medium-like article editor.
source_patterns: Feed scroll: topic-based infinite scroll, card-style article previews
Article reading: open article → wait 1-3s render → deep scroll with long reading pauses
Clap/reaction: multiple claps on dev.to (hold + click), stars on habr (single click)
Comment: scroll to bottom → read thread → reply click → 1-2s think → type → submit
Bookmark/save: click bookmark icon, instant feedback
Publishing flow: editor → title field → tag selection → body (markdown compose) → publish preview → confirm
Login: dev.to — GitHub/Twitter/Apple OAuth redirect; habr — email/password or social login

active_hours.description: Tech reading — business hours, evening; publishing — weekends

scroll.description: Feed: moderate-paced card scanning. Article: deep reading with long pauses, code block scanning. Source: tech blog reading patterns
scroll.infinite_scroll_detection: article count increase or scroll height change

login.description: Reading is public; writing/clapping/commenting requires auth. Dev.to: OAuth redirect flow. Habr: email/social form

platform_specific.sequence_hint: navigate feed → scroll 3-5 passes → click article → deep read (long pauses, code scanning) → scroll to comments → read → optionally reply → optionally clap → optionally bookmark → back to feed or publish
